text: And then they fly, not a labored, desperate flap,
but a powerful joyous stroke of wings that shatters the last of the storm's gloom.
Viridian is himself again, a creature of emerald and sky, his roar, a peel of thunder that echoes
not with sickness, but with life. Kalen, his rider, his partner, leans into the wind,
her heart soaring as high as the mountain they conquered.
Behind them lies a shrine to forgotten power, before them lies the whole world reclaimed.
They are dragon and rider, they are healed, they are home.
